creator: mhorne@freebsd.org
text:
The FAQ contains several links to specific Handbook chapters, but these don't point to the right place, and the user is instead redirected to the Handbook's front page. I assume this is fallout from the recent doc transition.

For example, section 3.4 of the FAQ contains the following link:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#bsdinstall/

But this chapter is really located at:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bsdinstall/

Section 12.6 links to a section:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#configuring-nfs

But this should be:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/network-servers/#network-configuring-nfs


... and more like this. Someone will need to make a pass at this document and evaluate where each link is intended to point.
